messages.content: Implement the external semantic search bridge integration with dual-write support
I'll implement the local semantic index with fallback support. Let me start with the bridge interface.
Add circuit breaker with 5 minute cooldown
Added circuit breaker pattern with configurable cooldown. Default is 5 minutes. The bridge gracefully degrades to FTS fallback when external semantic search is unavailable.
Embedding pipeline is set up with Ollama qwen3-embedding:4b. Resources are dual-written to trigger embedding automatically.
